testing_centers.notes: The Food Protection Manager exam is available at authorized proctored test sites or via online proctoring through servsafe.com. Food Handler, Alcohol, and Allergens exams are online-only and self-scheduled at servsafe.com. Employer group sessions are available for the Manager exam through authorized proctors.

id_requirements: Photo ID required for proctored exams (Manager certification). No ID required for online non-proctored exams (Food Handler, Alcohol, Allergens).
exam_rules: Proctored Manager exam: closed-book, no personal items or notes permitted. Online non-proctored exams: open at any time on servsafe.com; no proctor or scheduling required. Manager exam requires a proctor (instructor, third-party, or online proctor).
renewal_options: Food Protection Manager Certification: valid 5 years; must retake exam to renew. Food Handler Certificate: valid 3 years; must retake online course and exam. Alcohol and Allergens certificates: valid 3 years; must retake online exam. Renewal is at servsafe.com.

retake_policy.notes: Food Protection Manager: retake available immediately; full exam fee applies. Some proctors may require scheduling lead time. No waiting period for online non-proctored exams (Food Handler, Alcohol, Allergens).

official_study_resources.title: ServSafe Manager Book
official_study_resources.notes: Bundled course + exam packages available from $179. Online course also available at servsafe.com.

official_study_resources.title: ServSafe Online Course
official_study_resources.notes: Includes online course + exam attempt; bundled pricing varies by channel
